note: This is JSON saved as .list on purpose. Edit this file to add, remove, reorder, or update games on the website.

games.title: doodle bob goes insane
games.creator: bartish behaviour
games.description: A GameJolt project listed for the team. The public page does not have a real project pitch yet, so this card keeps the link live until the creator sends a banner and description.

games.title: Five Nights at Musical Rares 22 - 1 (FNaMR22-1)
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: Try to survive five nights inside Musical's Pizza Party World. The job looks simple until the characters start acting alive.

games.title: Billy's Theatre Show ACT-1
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: Andrés loses Rodger's Pizza Playhouse, then takes a job at the theatre that stole his character. The past follows him there, and the story connects to the FFD Saga.

games.title: Five Nights at Musical Rares - 1 "The Musical Investigation" [Recomposed]
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: A remake of the original FNaMR experience, with updated graphics, reworked lore, returning characters, mechanics, and story pieces.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner (Classic)
games.creator: CSB
games.description: You need money, so you take a night guard job at an animatronic restaurant with a rough history.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 2
games.creator: CSB
games.description: The same worker returns for a new summer job at the renovated Fishery's Family Diner.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 3
games.creator: CSB
games.description: In 1996, Daniel Stephans is hired to guard a horror attraction built around the mysteries of the older diner.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 4
games.creator: CSB
games.description: Jena gets hired at a new horror attraction based on the unsolved crimes and mysteries of Fishery's Family Diner.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 5
games.creator: CSB
games.description: An investigator follows what remains of the Fishery's Family Diner case into the mechanic hell.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner Overhaul
games.creator: CSB
games.description: An overhaul slot for the Fishery's Family Diner series. Add the official creator pitch and banner here when they are ready.

games.title: Wyre
games.creator: reese's pieces
games.description: A GameJolt project from reese's pieces. The card is ready for the official short pitch and banner once the creator sends them in.

games.title: Project: Unstuffed
games.creator: yobuddyalex
games.description: A fast-moving FNaF-style fan project from yobuddyalex. The GameJolt page includes a flashing-lights warning, so players should check the page before playing.

games.title: Nights at Felix's Remastered
games.creator: yobuddyalex
games.description: A remastered Nights at Felix's project from yobuddyalex. More details can be filled in when the creator sends the final pitch and banner.

games.title: FNaF: Re-clicked
games.creator: sonic Fan Games
games.description: A reimagined take on the classic FNaF games, built around smarter AI, new mechanics, and the same old pressure of making it through the night.

games.title: Five Nights at Freddy's: The Movie Edition
games.creator: sonic Fan Games
games.description: A cinematic FNaF fan-game entry inspired by the movie universe.

games.title: BLOXORZ - Remake
games.creator: sonic Fan Games
games.description: A faithful fan remake of the classic Flash puzzle game, with the 33 original levels plus extra custom levels.

games.title: Portal 1 & 2: The Clickteam Version
games.creator: sonic Fan Games
games.description: Portal 1 and Portal 2 rebuilt in 2D with Clickteam Fusion, including custom levels and extra fan-made content.

games.title: One Night at Freddy's
games.creator: sonic Fan Games
games.description: FNaF 1 compressed into one randomized night, with AI and night behavior changing every run.

games.title: DELTARUNE CTF Re-Make
games.creator: sonic Fan Games
games.description: A fan-made remake of DELTARUNE Chapter 1 in Clickteam Fusion, with extra custom touches added on top.

games.title: Five Nights at Musical Rares 22 - 2 "A Factory That Falls"
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: A follow-up FNaMR22 fan game centered around the factory setting. Added from the extra GameJolt link in the team list.

games.creator: Unknown Creator
games.description: A requested GameJolt listing from the updated team list. The project page does not have enough public info yet, so this stays as a simple link until the creator sends details.

games.title: Project: Unstuffed
games.creator: AlexFenixJRYT
games.description: In this game, you play as James. A 26 year old person trying to investigate on Fazbear Entertainment. He finds this job which lets him get some money out of it, but he is not safe. Not at all
